preamble: The deaffrication and fronting of the voiceless velar lateral affricate [kʟ] into the voiceless alveolar affricate [ts] is a process of simplification found in the history of Na-Dene and Tlingit dialects.

examples.note: Simplification of complex lateral affricates in certain modern speakers.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
